name: garrison-effectiveness
description: Two nations: Costa Rica owns costa_rica (fortificationLevel=2, army size=8 stationed = garrisoned). Nicaragua owns nicaragua (fortificationLevel=2, armySize=0 = ungarrisoned fort). Expected: costa_rica shows garrisonSuppression component in equilibrium causes (negative, ~−0.04) because its army is stationed at a fort. nicaragua shows NO garrisonSuppression (army size=0, ungarrisoned). Also validates effectiveFortLevel: costa_rica's fort provides more infrastructure bonus due to garrison fraction. Garrison upkeep reduction applies to Costa Rica's army (25% discount). No war — pure garrison mechanics validation.

payload.comment: Costa Rica has 8 stationed soldiers at fort L2 (GARRISON_FULL_THRESHOLD=8 = 100% garrison) → garrisonSuppression = −GARRISON_UNREST_SUPPRESSION = −0.04 (non-zero → present)
Nicaragua has armySize=0, no garrison → garrisonSuppression = 0 → not present
